name: Bell Pepper & Fresh Corn Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 small Red bell pepper, seeded and chopped
1 small Green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine corn, egg yolk, cornmeal, flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Fold half of the egg whites into the cornmeal mixture, then fold in the rest.
3. Do not overmix.
4. Coat a medium-hot skillet with oil.
5. Drop batter into the skillet by the tablespoon. Ensure the edges do not touch.
6. Cook until golden brown; turn carefully and cook on the other side.
7. Repeat until all batter is used.
8. Serve with salsa as an appetizer or side dish.
